prompt: Generate an image of a crowd in a park, using the segmentation mask from the reference image to guide the composition and placement of people against the landscape background, illustrating semantic segmentation.
prompt_refined: Generate an image of a crowd in a park. Utilize the semantic segmentation mask in image 1 to define the precise composition and placement of scene elements. Render the red segmented regions as a crowd of people positioned on a light green grassy park ground (corresponding to the light green region). The background should consist of dark green trees and foliage (corresponding to the dark green region) under a blue sky (corresponding to the blue region), all following the exact shapes and spatial layout provided in image 1.
